goal: Fix header padding and text sizes on Dashboard and History

stepSummaries:
1. Dashboard: tighten header padding pb-6 mb-8 → pb-4 mb-6, convert text-[10px] → text-xs [verified]
  2. History: tighten header padding pb-6 mb-8 → pb-4 mb-6, convert text-[10px] → text-xs [verified]
  3. Run build to verify no errors [verified]
